notes: Combined follow-up after v4.3.188: fixes home safety overflow and color/texture tuning while also cleaning medicinal action filter behavior.

Retunes the medium green panel color to #B4C9A4FF, increases contrast of the approved textures, and fixes the home safety caveat/dialog wrapping so the warning button and popup stay inside the viewport.

Medicinal action filters now show only structured, source-supported action tags that actually exist in the loaded records; empty hard-coded categories are no longer shown as selectable zero-count buckets.

Normalizes Chaga's immunomodulating tag to the existing Immune support action vocabulary and keeps weak/unsupported structured action tags out of action filters while leaving traditional-use records visible.
No species edibility, toxicity, food-route, Other Uses route, map feature, or image-rights change is included; the orange-latex milkcap image remains unchanged pending a verified replacement image.
